examples: He was hit by shrapnel from a grenade.
He was wounded in both legs and severely peppered with shrapnel.
The potentially lethal device was made from a length of hose packed with gunpowder, primers, and shrapnel.
But the shrapnel has been falling in remote places like China, Brazil, Colombia and Turkey, too.
There's also a piece of shrapnel still wedged in a finger, more than six decades later.
